Class HomeController

java.lang.Object
com.splendor.web.controller.HomeController
@Controller public class HomeController extends Object
Spring MVC controller for the home page and starting a new game.

Validates JSON player setup from the client, builds a GameSession via GameService, and stores it in the HTTP session before redirecting to the game view.

  • Constructor Summary

    Description

    Creates the controller with game logic and JSON parsing dependencies.

  • Constructor Details

    • HomeController

      public HomeController(GameService gameService, com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper objectMapper)
      Creates the controller with game logic and JSON parsing dependencies.
      Parameters:
      gameService - service used to construct a new GameSession from player setup
      objectMapper - Jackson mapper used to deserialize playersJson into payloads

  • Method Details

    • index

      @GetMapping("/") public String index(org.springframework.ui.Model model)
      Serves the new-game setup page at the application root.
      Parameters:
      model - Spring MVC model (unused for the index view as provided)
      Returns:
      logical view name "index"

    • newGame

      @PostMapping("/new-game") public String newGame(@RequestParam("playersJson") String playersJson, jakarta.servlet.http.HttpSession session, org.springframework.web.servlet.mvc.support.RedirectAttributes ra)
      Accepts posted player configuration, starts a new game, and redirects to /game.

      Expects playersJson to be a JSON array of PlayerSetupPayload objects (2–4 players). On validation or parse failure, redirects to / with a flash error.

      Parameters:
      playersJson - JSON array string: [{"name":"...","human":true}, ...]
      session - HTTP session; receives attribute "gameSession" and "showTour"
      ra - redirect flash attributes for errors when setup is invalid
      Returns:
      redirect to /game on success, or redirect:/ with flash error
